## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

> **All boxes must be checked before requesting review.**

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows our [coding standards](../docs/coding-standards.md) (modular, well-commented)
- [ ] I have not blind-copied AI-generated code — I understand every line I'm committing
- [ ] Complex logic has explanatory comments describing the **why**, not just the what
- [ ] No dead code, debug logs, or `console.log` statements left in

### Git & Security
- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with `dev` (`git pull origin dev`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files are included in this PR
- [ ] No `node_modules/` or build artifacts are committed
- [ ] `.env.example` has been updated if new environment variables were added

### PR Standards
- [ ] This PR is small and focused on **one** concern
- [ ] PR title clearly describes the change
- [ ] This PR is linked to a Notion task (see above)
- [ ] I have assigned at least **1 peer reviewer**
- [ ] I have **not** self-approved this PR

### UI Changes (skip if backend/docs only)
- [ ] Screenshots or screen recording of the UI change are attached below
